gt-reset-confirm: Reset ALL tracker progress for this game?
kh-subtitle: Every trophy, sleight, card, character file and minigame in one checklist — tracked separately for Sora and Riku, saved in your browser. Checklist data from xenodusk's completion guide.
kp-note: Backs up / restores ALL Kingdom Hearts tracker progress on this site as a JSON file.
kp-import-confirm: Importing will overwrite the saved progress of every KH tool on this site with the file's contents. Continue?
kp-import-error: That file could not be read as a progress export.

trophies.name: Game Clear: Proud with Sora
trophies.desc: Clear Proud Mode with Sora and watched the ending.

trophies.name: Game Clear: Proud with Riku
trophies.desc: Clear Proud Mode with Riku and watched the ending

trophies.name: Undefeated
trophies.desc: Clear game without using a continue.

trophies.name: Natural Player Sora
trophies.desc: Clear Sora's Story on Standard.

trophies.name: Natural Player Riku
trophies.desc: Clear Riku's Story on Standard.

trophies.name: Novice Player Sora
trophies.desc: Clear Sora's Story on Beginner.

trophies.name: Novice Player Riku
trophies.desc: Clear Riku's Story on Beginner.

trophies.name: Veggie Master
trophies.desc: Get a score of 150 points or higher in the Veggie Panic mini-game.

trophies.name: Ace Pilot
trophies.desc: Get a score of 500 points or higher in the Balloon Glider mini-game.

trophies.name: High Jumper
trophies.desc: Get a score of 120 points or higher in Tigger's Tigger's Jump-a-Thon mini-game.

trophies.name: Sky Diver
trophies.desc: Get a score of 2,000 points or higher in the Whirlwind Plunge mini-game

trophies.name: Bee Buster
trophies.desc: Clear all 70 bees within 1 minute and 40 seconds in the Bumble-Rumble mini-game.

trophies.name: A Slumber to Remember
trophies.desc: Clear Sora's story mode.

trophies.name: Sleight Master
trophies.desc: Obtain all of Sora's sleights.

trophies.name: Card of Memories
trophies.desc: Clear Castle Oblivion 1F.

trophies.name: Woven Memories
trophies.desc: Clear Castle Oblivion 5F.

trophies.name: The Truth
trophies.desc: Clear Castle Oblivion 13F.

trophies.name: Road to Dawn
trophies.desc: Clear Riku's story mode.

trophies.name: Hard Hitter
trophies.desc: Obtain all attack bonuses for Riku.

trophies.name: Confronting with Darkness
trophies.desc: Clear Castle Oblivion B12F.

trophies.name: Challenge from the Inner Darkness
trophies.desc: Clear Castle Oblivion B8F.

trophies.name: Overcoming the Darkness
trophies.desc: Clear Castle Oblivion B1F.

trophies.name: Complete Record
trophies.desc: Completed all of Jiminy's Journal.

trophies.name: Card Master Sora
trophies.desc: Collect all Card Collection entries in Jiminy's Journal.

trophies.name: Storyteller Sora
trophies.desc: Collect all Story entries in Jiminy's Journal.

trophies.name: Character Professor Sora
trophies.desc: Collect all Character entries in Jiminy's Journal.

trophies.name: Mini-game Maniac Sora
trophies.desc: Collect all Mini-game entries in Jiminy's Journal.

trophies.name: Record Keeper Riku
trophies.desc: Complete all D Report entries.

trophies.name: Card Master Riku
trophies.desc: Collect all Card Collection entries in D Report.

trophies.name: Storyteller Riku
trophies.desc: Collect all Story entires in the D Report.

trophies.name: Character Professor Riku
trophies.desc: Collect all Character entries in the D Report.

trophies.name: Novice Deck Builder
trophies.desc: Edit a card deck for the first time.

trophies.name: Expert Deck Builder
trophies.desc: Edit a card deck 500 times.

trophies.name: Premium Card Maker
trophies.desc: Make 20 cards become Premium Cards.

trophies.name: No Escape
trophies.desc: Clear the game without escaping from a single battle.

trophies.name: Level Counter Limit: Sora
trophies.desc: Sora has reached the highest level.

trophies.name: Level Counter Limit: Riku
trophies.desc: Riku has reached the highest level.

trophies.name: Card Breaker
trophies.desc: Break an enemies card 1,500 times.

trophies.name: Tightrope Walker
trophies.desc: Replenish HP when you have less than 5% HP.

trophies.name: Interceptor
trophies.desc: Strike an enemy before entering battle 150 times.

trophies.name: Duel Master
trophies.desc: Win 100 duels.

trophies.name: Battle Card Collector
trophies.desc: Obtain over 300 battle cards.

trophies.name: Moogle Mogul
trophies.desc: Get over 10,000 Moogle Points.

trophies.name: Regular Customer
trophies.desc: Use over 20,000 Moogle Points at Moogle Shops.

trophies.name: Room Creator
trophies.desc: Synthesize 300 rooms.

trophies.name: Treasure Hunter
trophies.desc: Open 10 chests from hidden rooms.

trophies.name: Ace Striker
trophies.desc: Hit an enemy with an object.

sleights.name: Sliding Dash

sleights.name: Stun Impact

sleights.name: Blitz
